name: Campbell Park
description: Campbell Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Willoughby Hills, OH. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Civic Center Park
description: Civic Center Park is a place to play pickleball in Mentor, OH. There are 15 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Concord Sports Plex
description: Concord Sports Plex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Painesville, OH. There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and trainers or lessons. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.

name: East End YMCA
description: East End YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Madison, OH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Eastlake Skatepark
description:
No regular scheduled play.  A mixture of players play on courts.  Sign says for casual play on first-come first serve basis with exception of reserved times.  30 minute maximum play if players are waiting; consider inviting others to play.
Information added by Rick Warsinskey, PB Ambassador for NE Ohio.  Contact Rick at 216-409-2882 or rickwarsinskey@gmail.com to get his comprehensive guides to play PB in NE Ohio and on his newsletter e-mail list.

name: Erie Pickleball
description: Posted by Rick Warsinskey; NE Ohio PB Ambassador; contact Rick at rickwarsinskey@gmail.com to get his comprehensive guide to PB for NE Ohio.  Also 216-409-2882

name: Jindra Park Pickleball Courts
description: Open dawn to dusk.

name: Kirtland Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Kirtland Community Center in Kirtland, OH! There are 4 wood and hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Lake County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Lake County YMCA in Painesville, OH! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Lakeland Community College
description: Lakeland Community College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kirtland, OH. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: MAdison TWP Veterans park
description: MAdison TWP Veterans park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Madison, OH. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Mentor Community Recreation Center
description: Mentor Community Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mentor, OH. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: Mentor Harbor Yachting Club
description: Mentor Harbor Yachting Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mentor, OH. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Mentor Pickleball Courts
description: Mentor Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Mentor, OH. There are 15 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Osborne Park
description: Osborne Park is a place to play pickleball in Willoughby, OH. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Perry Township park
description: Come play pickleball at Perry Township park in Perry, OH! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Pickleball Play 365
description: Our court surface is made from cushioned pickleroll, (but this option was not available in the Picklehead's court surface selection so we were not able to select it). Pickleroll is a surface that allows for great mobility and is often used on professional courts in national tournaments.
open_play_schedule: The most updated events will first be pushed to Court Reserve. You can sign in or create an account to view our updated events here:  https://mobileapp.courtreserve.com/Online/Calendar/Events/12112/Month
fees: Members only — There are various tiers of membership opportunities.  There is an affordable introductory price option for those wanting to just come and play. All payment/ court reservations goes thro

name: Richard J. Bonde Activities Center at Manry Park
description: Richard J. Bonde Activities Center at Manry Park is a place to play pickleball in Willowick, OH. There are 5 courts. 3 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Town Hall Park Pickleball Courts (Poyar Family)
description:
Net between courts added
In the morning there are almost always people there playing if the weather is good.
No fence between courts; no windscreen

name: West End YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at West End YMCA in Willoughby, OH! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Willoughby Municipal Courts
description: Willoughby Municipal Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Willoughby, OH. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Willoughby Pickleball
description: Willoughby Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Willoughby, OH. There is 1 indoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The court is private. You can reserve the court.

name: Willoughby Senior Center
description: Willoughby Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Willoughby, OH. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.
